subcodes.first_line: O thou who bearest every hardship in the path of God, O thou bearer of the Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تحمل کل مشقة فى سبیل الله حضرت اسم اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Eastern values; culture, @education of children; moral education, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @growth of the Cause, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
